item.title: Teaching my backpack how to ride 🥺🖤 I’m so proud of her she did so good!📸🏍️ It was her first time and she’s 5 feet tall and was determined to ride a sport bike. We made it happen LFG!! @madison.dy 🫶 • • #motorcycle #r6 #fyp #yamaha #r7 #r1 #bikelife #coup
item.description: Teaching my backpack how to ride 🥺🖤 I’m so proud of her she did so good!📸🏍️ It was her first time and she’s 5 feet tall and was determined to ride a sport bike. We made it happen LFG!! @madison.dy 🫶 • • #motorcycle #r6 #fyp #yamaha #r7 #r1 #bikelife #coup

item.title: I can’t keep defending myself. “Does my —s look good??”💀😂 Love you @madison.dy 😚🖤 • #motorcycle #r6 #fyp #yamaha #r7 #r1 #bikelife #couple #yzf #biketok #booktok #revzz #funnybiker #revzz #bikergirl
